faq.question: What is Investment Technology Indonesia?
faq.answer: Investment Technology Indonesia is an information technology company providing software development, website development, mobile applications, networking, cloud computing, cybersecurity, server infrastructure, and digital transformation solutions.

faq.question: What industries do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve government institutions, private companies, startups, SMEs, educational institutions, healthcare organizations, financial services, manufacturing, logistics, and retail businesses.

faq.question: What services do you provide?
faq.answer: Our services include Software Development, Website Development, Mobile Application Development, Networking, Server & Data Center, Cloud Solutions, Cyber Security, CCTV Systems, Smart Office, Digital Marketing, IT Consulting, Maintenance & Support, Fiber Optic Infrastructure, and Super App & AI solutions.

faq.question: Can you build custom software?
faq.answer: Yes. We develop custom software tailored to business requirements, including ERP, CRM, HRIS, POS, inventory systems, finance systems, dashboards, and enterprise applications.

faq.question: Do you develop responsive websites?
faq.answer: Yes. Every website we build is fully responsive, SEO-friendly, optimized for performance, and compatible with desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

faq.question: Do you develop Android and iOS applications?
faq.answer: Yes. We build cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter, allowing one codebase for both Android and iOS.

faq.question: Do you provide networking installation?
faq.answer: Yes. We provide LAN, WAN, WiFi, VPN, MikroTik, Cisco, Ubiquiti, firewall, structured cabling, and enterprise networking solutions.

faq.question: Can you migrate our infrastructure to the cloud?
faq.answer: Yes. We provide cloud migration services, cloud backup, virtualization, business email, Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud integration.

faq.question: Do you provide cybersecurity services?
faq.answer: Yes. We offer security audits, penetration testing, firewall deployment, endpoint protection, vulnerability assessment, and continuous security monitoring.

faq.question: Do you provide maintenance after project completion?
faq.answer: Yes. We offer preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, software updates, server monitoring, backup management, and technical support.

faq.question: Can you integrate existing systems?
faq.answer: Yes. We provide API integration, payment gateway integration, ERP integration, CRM integration, and third-party system connectivity.

faq.question: Will my website be SEO optimized?
faq.answer: Yes. Every website includes technical SEO, structured data, responsive design, optimized performance, sitemap, robots.txt, and metadata.

faq.question: What technologies do you use?
faq.answer: We use HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, PHP, Laravel, Node.js, React, Flutter, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Docker, Linux, Firebase, and REST APIs.

faq.question: Can investors collaborate with your company?
faq.answer: Yes. We welcome strategic partnerships and investment opportunities for technology products, digital platforms, AI solutions, and Super App development.

faq.question: Do you work with clients outside Indonesia?
faq.answer: Yes. We provide remote software development and IT consulting services for international clients.

faq.question: How can I request technical support?
faq.answer: You can contact us via WhatsApp, email, contact form, or schedule an online consultation with our technical team.

faq.question: How long does software development take?
faq.answer: Project duration depends on complexity. Small projects generally take 2–4 weeks, while enterprise systems may require several months.

faq.question: Do you provide website hosting?
faq.answer: Yes. We assist with domain registration, hosting, VPS deployment, SSL certificates, email configuration, and ongoing maintenance.

faq.question: Can you develop AI-based solutions?
faq.answer: Yes. We build AI-powered chatbots, automation systems, recommendation engines, business intelligence dashboards, and machine learning integrations.

faq.question: How do I start a project with Investment Technology Indonesia?
faq.answer: Simply contact us through our website, WhatsApp, or email. We will discuss your requirements, prepare a proposal, estimate the timeline, and begin development after project approval.
